weapons.name: Ultra Nebulan Assault Rifle
weapons.farmTips: Farm Joker (Lv90 Blatta) in Noctilum Divine Roost, Feliciano (Lv70 Sphinx) in Oblivia, or Aquatic Visigels (Lv66-68) in Sylvalum Noctilucent Sphere

weapons.name: Ultra Nebulan Assault Rifle II
weapons.farmTips: Bring part members using Assault Rifles (Gwin, etc.) to bias drops

weapons.name: Ultra Nebulan Assault Rifle III
weapons.farmTips: All weapon drops are random; stack Treasure Sensor to 100% for guaranteed gold boxes

weapons.name: Ultra Nebulan Avagar
weapons.farmTips: Grenada weapons shine with Ranged Attack Up and Potential Up traits

weapons.name: Ultra Nebulan Sclopetum
weapons.farmTips: Meredith weapons can roll Critical Rate Up

weapons.name: Ultra Nebulan Assailer
weapons.farmTips: C&C weapons can roll Treasure Sensor - equip on party for better farming

weapons.name: Ultra Nebulan Rapture
weapons.farmTips: Factory 1.21 unlocked after 'Professor B's Return' mission

weapons.name: Ultra Transience Raidrifle
weapons.farmTips: Six Stars unlocked after 'A Challenger Approaches' mission

weapons.name: Ultra Nebulan Sniper Rifle
weapons.farmTips: Sniper Rifles have high single-shot damage - great for opening attacks

weapons.name: Ultra Nebulan Sniper Rifle II
weapons.farmTips: Bring party members with Snipers (Mia, Doug) to increase drop rate

weapons.name: Ultra Nebulan Retic
weapons.farmTips: Grenada snipers have faster cooldown than Sakuraba

weapons.name: Ultra Nebulan Sicarius
weapons.farmTips: High stability means more consistent damage

weapons.name: Ultra Transience Deadsight
weapons.farmTips: Highest attack Sniper at 160 - top tier ranged weapon

weapons.name: Ultra Transience Deadsight II
weapons.farmTips: Best Six Stars sniper - lower ammo but higher stability

weapons.name: Ultra Nebulan Dual Guns
weapons.farmTips: Dual Guns are A-tier; Ghostwalker art makes them excellent for survivability

weapons.name: Ultra Nebulan Dual Guns II
weapons.farmTips: Bring Elma, Liesel, Celica in party to bias Dual Gun drops

weapons.name: Ultra Nebulan Gemels
weapons.farmTips: Fastest firing Dual Guns at 1.833s cooldown

weapons.name: Ultra Transience Sidearm
weapons.farmTips: Best stat Dual Guns overall

weapons.name: Ultra Nebulan Machine
weapons.farmTips: Gatling Guns are S-tier - best Thermal damage weapons

weapons.name: Ultra Nebulan Machine II
weapons.farmTips: Slightly higher attack than Machine I

weapons.name: Ultra Nebulan Repethe
weapons.farmTips: Fastest cooldown Gatling Gun

weapons.name: Ultra Nebulan Grando
weapons.farmTips: Highest stability Gatling Gun

weapons.name: Ultra Nebulan Raygun
weapons.farmTips: Rayguns are S-tier - highest attack stat, great for Beam Bomber build

weapons.name: Ultra Nebulan Lastyr
weapons.farmTips: Fastest cooldown Raygun

weapons.name: Ultra Nebulan Lastyr II
weapons.farmTips: Highest attack Raygun at 272, but only 1 ammo

weapons.name: Ultra Transience Glaive
weapons.farmTips: Glaives are exclusive Six Stars Longswords dropped by specific tyrants. Lugalbanda (Lv88 Chimaera) in Noctilum Riorl Cesspool. Treasure Sensor guarantees Glaive drop.

weapons.name: Ultra Transience Glaive II
weapons.farmTips: Higher base attack than Glaive I

weapons.name: Ultra Diamond Sword
weapons.farmTips: Longswords are S-tier - best melee weapon. Blossom Dance one-shots enemies. Farm with Nagi, Frye, Win in party.

weapons.name: Ultra Diamond Sword II
weapons.farmTips: Higher damage than Sword I. Use Ether attribute version for Core Crusher build.

weapons.name: Ultra Diamond Slair
weapons.farmTips: Fastest Longsword at 1.667s cooldown

weapons.name: Ultra Diamond Spatha
weapons.farmTips: Popular choice for Potential-focused Blossom Dance builds

weapons.name: Ultra Diamond Pride
weapons.farmTips: Factory 1.21 weapons can roll unique trait combinations

weapons.name: Ultra Diamond Spear
weapons.farmTips: Javelins have Reflect attribute capabilities - great for specialized builds

weapons.name: Ultra Diamond Spear II
weapons.farmTips: Same attack as Spear I with higher stability

weapons.name: Ultra Phenomenon Lance
weapons.farmTips: Best Javelin tier

weapons.name: Ultra Diamond Blades
weapons.farmTips: Dual Swords are A-tier. Shadowrunner and Killing Machine auras. Fast attacks.

weapons.name: Ultra Diamond Blades II
weapons.farmTips: Higher attack than Blades I

weapons.name: Ultra Diamond Ralzes
weapons.farmTips: Fastest Dual Swords at 1.333s cooldown

weapons.name: Ultra Phenomenon Edges II
weapons.farmTips: Top tier Dual Swords

weapons.name: Ultra Nebulan Launchers
weapons.farmTips: Psycho Launchers have Gravity element arts. Good for support builds.

weapons.name: Ultra Nebulan Psylans
weapons.farmTips: Fastest Psycho Launchers

weapons.name: Ultra Nebulan Saboteurs
weapons.farmTips: C&C weapons can roll Overdrive-related traits

weapons.name: Striker Sclopetum
weapons.farmTips: Solid mid-game rifle, upgrade from Destroyer series

weapons.name: Cermet Sword
weapons.farmTips: Good mid-game longsword before Delta/Carbide

weapons.name: Worn Striker Sclopetum
weapons.dropSource: Enemies level 46-50 with random weapon drops
weapons.farmTips: Worn prefix requires Lv47 (3 below shop version)

weapons.name: Advanced Striker Sclopetum
weapons.dropSource: Enemies level 51-55 with random weapon drops
weapons.farmTips: Advanced prefix requires Lv53 (3 above shop version)

weapons.name: Ultra Cosmic Sclopetum
weapons.dropSource: Enemies level 61-65 with random weapon drops
weapons.farmTips: Second best assault rifle tier. Farm enemies level 61-65.

weapons.name: Ultra Ceramic Sword
weapons.dropSource: Enemies level 61-65 with random weapon drops
weapons.farmTips: Second best longsword tier. Bridge between shop Delta and endgame Ultra Diamond.

weapons.name: Striker Crank
weapons.farmTips: Shop-bought C&C Gatling Gun, good mid-game Thermal option

weapons.name: Cermet Spatha
weapons.farmTips: Shop-bought Meredith longsword, alternative to Sakuraba Cermet Sword

weapons.name: Striker Dyads
weapons.farmTips: Good mid-game Dual Guns with Ghostwalker access

weapons.name: Ultra Cosmic Sidearm
weapons.dropSource: Enemies level 61-65 with random weapon drops
weapons.farmTips: Second best Six Stars Dual Guns

weapons.name: Ultra Cosmic Lastyr
weapons.farmTips: Second best Grenada Raygun tier, farm enemies level 61-65

weapons.name: Ultra Ceramic Spear
weapons.farmTips: Second best javelin tier, bridge between shop and endgame Ultra Diamond

armor.name: Ultra Infinite Visor
armor.notes: Hermit Ictus in Sylvalum with spore weather also work

armor.name: Ultra Infinite Headwear
armor.keyTyrant: Necro, the Cavelord (Lv69) / Pjotr the Shepherd (Lv74)
armor.location: Primordia - Drop Shaft / Noctilum - Narcissus Tree

armor.name: Ultra Infinite Armor
armor.keyTyrant: Necro, the Cavelord (Lv69) / Pjotr the Shepherd (Lv74)
armor.location: Primordia - Drop Shaft / Noctilum - Narcissus Tree

armor.name: Ultra Infinite Helmet
armor.notes: Skell Wear only from Sakuraba and Grenada

armor.name: Ultra Infinite Veyes
armor.location: Cauldros - Beastial Utopia (Cervus) / Scirpo in various
armor.notes: Cervus found in Cauldros Mount M'gando north cave (Lv60-65)

armor.name: Ultra Infinite Spex
armor.notes: Very rare drop from Lazuli Forfex

armor.name: Ultra Infinite Casca
armor.keyTyrant: Balduino, the Wicked-eyed (Lv89) / Berthold the Blue-eyed (Lv75)
armor.location: Noctilum - Divine Roost / Sylvalum - Sandsprint Cavity

armor.name: Ultra Infinite Vizard
armor.location: Cauldros - Beastial Utopia / Mount M'gando north cave

armor.name: Ultra Infinite Screen
armor.notes: C&C armor has Treasure Sensor trait - great for farming gear

armor.name: Ultra Infinite Armet
armor.location: Sylvalum - Northwest island (very rare) / Sylvalum Sandsprint Cavity (Liceor Lv65)
armor.notes: Stream Jacul is very rare. Liceor in Sandsprint Cavity are more accessible.

armor.name: Ultra Infinite Yii
armor.keyTyrant: Luciel, the Eternal (Lv92) / Fernando the Immovable (Lv85)
armor.notes: Millesaur species drops Orphean Light. Sacrifole in Beastial Utopia also drop.

armor.name: Ultra Infinite Zyi
armor.keyTyrant: Hartmut, the Calamity (Lv91) / Elvira the Talondrake (Lv90)
armor.location: Oblivia - Big Ravine / Primordia - Drop Shaft (day)
armor.notes: Two excellent tyrants for Orphean Heavy

armor.name: Ultra Infinite Zyua (Heavy Torso)
armor.keyTyrant: Hartmut, the Calamity (Lv91) / Elvira the Talondrake (Lv90)
armor.location: Oblivia - Big Ravine / Primordia - Drop Shaft

armor.name: Ultra Infinite Mask
armor.keyTyrant: Wenzel, the Inebriated / Xair the Cerrulean Walker (Lv75)
armor.location: Oblivia - mountain SE of Yawning Giant / Sylvalum west waters
armor.notes: Saltat can also drop at lower levels

armor.name: Ultra Infinite Helm
armor.location: Cauldros - Mount M'gando Crater (brimstone rain) / Titan's Table

schematics.notes: Rare drop from Marnucks

schematics.name: Delta Bliss Multigun
schematics.notes: Only non-random weapon schematic. Multigun is D-tier.

schematics.name: Formula Zero
schematics.notes: Overdrive: Jinrai. Max HP 17000, Melee ATK 387, Ranged ATK 381, Potential 650. Materials: Rexoskell Sucker x5, Crude Neilnail Mask x3, Xe-dom Crimson Crest x4, Ancient Armor x10, Advanced Crank x8, Xe-dom Hand x12, Miranium 10000, Ouroboros Crystal x2.

schematics.name: Urban Lincoln
schematics.notes: Overdrive: Oboro. Max HP 18000, Melee ATK 501, Ranged ATK 318, Potential 700. Materials: Rexoskell Sucker x8, Crude Neilnail Mask x6, Xe-dom Jet-Black Crest x6, Ancient Armor x6, Advanced Crank x4, Xe-dom Hand x12, Miranium 10000, Ouroboros Crystal x2.

schematics.name: Verus Cain
schematics.notes: Overdrive: Hagane. Max HP 17500, Melee ATK 433, Ranged ATK 360, Potential 680. Materials: Rexoskell Sucker x10, Crude Neilnail Mask x4, Xe-dom Golden Crest x8, Ancient Armor x6, Advanced Crank x12, Xe-dom Hand x2, Miranium 10000, Ouroboros Crystal x2.

schematics.name: Lailah Queen
schematics.notes: Overdrive: Nagi. Max HP 21000, Melee ATK 570, Ranged ATK 381, Potential 550. Highest base ranged accuracy of any non-Ares Skell. Materials: Rexoskell Sucker x6, Crude Neilnail Mask x4, Xe-dom Silver Crest x12, Ancient Armor x2, Advanced Crank x8, Xe-dom Hand x10, Miranium 10000, Ouroboros Crystal x2.

schematics.name: Inferno Skydon
schematics.notes: Overdrive: Hibana. Max HP 22000, Melee ATK 456, Ranged ATK 593, Potential 580. Ranged-focused medium frame. Materials: Rexoskell Sucker x12, Crude Neilnail Mask x2, Xe-dom Crimson Crest x8, Ancient Armor x6, Advanced Crank x6, Xe-dom Hand x8, Miranium 10000, Ouroboros Crystal x2.

schematics.name: Mastema White Reaper
schematics.notes: Overdrive: Gekitetsu. Max HP 23500, Melee ATK 524, Ranged ATK 678, Potential 550. Highest base ranged attack of any player Skell. Materials: Rexoskell Sucker x4, Crude Neilnail Mask x2, Xe-dom Jet-Black Crest x6, Ancient Armor x10, Advanced Crank x12, Xe-dom Hand x12, Miranium 10000, Ouroboros Crystal x2.

schematics.name: Amdusias Hades
schematics.notes: Overdrive: Kurenai. Max HP 25500, Melee ATK 798, Ranged ATK 381, Potential 200. Highest base melee ATK of all non-Ares Skells. Materials: Rexoskell Sucker x6, Crude Neilnail Mask x4, Xe-dom Golden Crest x12, Ancient Armor x4, Advanced Crank x8, Xe-dom Hand x8, Miranium 10000, Ouroboros Crystal x2.

schematics.name: Ares 90
schematics.notes: Overdrive: Legion. Max HP 41000, Melee ATK 816, Ranged ATK 602, Potential 900. Pre-equipped with unique ARES-series weapons. Materials: Golden Yggralith Heart x2, Silver Vita Core x4, Crude Neilnail Mask x12, Seidr Control Device x8, Advanced Core x12, Upgraded Lens x16, Miranium 100000, Cimmerian Cinnabar x2.

schematics.name: Hraesvelg Lord
schematics.notes: Overdrive: Jinrai. Highest evasion of any Skell (134). DE exclusive. Materials: Vasara War Medal x1, Golden Armor x2, Xe-dom Jet-Black Crest x5, Ancient Armor x6, Advanced Chamber x3, Aeviter Death Stone x4, Miranium 30000, Ouroboros Crystal x2.

schematics.name: US0860 Excavator
schematics.notes: Overdrive: Moroha. Max HP 33000, Melee ATK 920 (highest in DE). Materials: Rexoskell Sucker x2, Crude Neilnail Mask x2, Xe-dom Crimson Crest x3, Seidr Control Device x5, Obsidian Cluster x4, Advanced Crank x5, Miranium 30000, Ouroboros Crystal x2.

schematics.name: US0232 Police
schematics.notes: Overdrive: Hagane. Level 30. Modified Urban frame with police livery. Materials rewarded directly from mission. Miranium 10000, Enduron Lead x2.

schematics.name: US0830 Dozer
schematics.notes: Overdrive: Moroha. Level 30. Construction-themed orange frame. Materials rewarded directly from mission. Miranium 10000, Boiled-Egg Ore x2.

farmingGuides.title: Joker the Unknowable
farmingGuides.description: Inside a giant flower. Surrounded by 19 Squall Blatta (Lv60). A Lv50 Skell with G-Buster and Phoenix can clear easily. Drops only weapons - no armor or Skell gear. Best universal weapon farm.

farmingGuides.title: Feliciano & Durvin
farmingGuides.enemy: Feliciano the All-Seeing (Lv70 Sphinx) / Durvin the Perceptive (Lv70 Sphinx)
farmingGuides.location: Feliciano: Oblivia - Sea Whisper Valley / Durvin: Primordia - Beast's Lair
farmingGuides.description: Drop weapons only + Blazing Gas Sacs (needed for Potential Up augments). Break tail for sacs. Feliciano has proximity spike aura - equip Spike Evasion. Use Ares 90 for one-shot kills. Best farming spot if you also need Potential Up materials.

farmingGuides.title: Aquatic Visigels
farmingGuides.location: Sylvalum - Noctilucent Sphere Interior (near FN Site 411)
farmingGuides.description: Multiple Visigels floating around. No AoE weapons - avoid hitting Pharsis the Everqueen (Lv99 Yggralith). Bring Ether Resistance augments or Visual/Sound Cloak. Best for farming large quantities quickly. Also drop Visigel Poison Orbs for Weapon Attack Power Up augments.

farmingGuides.title: Hiro the Priceless
farmingGuides.description: Good weapon farming option. Blatta enemies drop only weapons.

farmingGuides.title: Orphean Heavy Armor
farmingGuides.enemy: Hartmut the Calamity (Lv91 Millepod) / Elvira the Talondrake (Lv90 Colubrim)
farmingGuides.location: Hartmut: Oblivia - Big Ravine / Elvira: Primordia - Drop Shaft (day)
farmingGuides.description: Best source for Ultra Infinite Orphean Heavy armor set.

farmingGuides.title: Orphean Light Armor
farmingGuides.enemy: Luciel the Eternal (Lv92 Millesaur) / Fernando the Immovable (Lv85 Millesaur)
farmingGuides.location: Luciel: Primordia - Janpath Lake / Fernando: Noctilum - Decapotamon (day)
farmingGuides.description: Best source for Ultra Infinite Orphean Light armor.

farmingGuides.title: Meredith Heavy Armor
farmingGuides.description: Best source for Ultra Infinite Meredith Heavy armor.

farmingGuides.title: Six Stars Heavy Armor
farmingGuides.description: Best source for Ultra Infinite Six Stars Heavy armor. Gaia Gularth (Lv60-80) also works.

farmingGuides.title: Grenada Skell Armor
farmingGuides.description: Best source for Ultra Infinite Grenada Skell wear. Also Crazed Aeviter (Lv65-68) in Noctilum.

farmingGuides.title: Sakuraba Light Armor
farmingGuides.description: Best source for Ultra Infinite Sakuraba Light. Hermit Ictus in Sylvalum (spore weather) also work.

farmingGuides.title: Glaive (Katana) Farming
farmingGuides.enemy: Lugalbanda the Wanderer-king (Lv88 Chimaera) / Dadaan the Strongest (Lv??)
farmingGuides.location: Lugalbanda: Noctilum - Riorl Cesspool (cave, pink water)
farmingGuides.description: Drops exclusive Six Stars Glaive Longswords. Treasure Sensor guarantees a Glaive drop (except Lugalbanda and Dadaan). These are unique weapons with fixed names and traits.

farmingGuides.title: Sakuraba Heavy Armor
farmingGuides.description: Best source for Ultra Infinite Sakuraba Heavy armor.

Ultra Nebulan.name: Ultra Nebulan
Ultra Nebulan.description: Ranged weapons dropped by enemies level 66+. Max attack stat.

Ultra Diamond.name: Ultra Diamond
Ultra Diamond.description: Melee weapons dropped by enemies level 66+. Max attack stat.

Ultra Transience.name: Ultra Transience
Ultra Transience.description: Six Stars ranged weapons dropped by enemies level 66+.

Ultra Phenomenon.name: Ultra Phenomenon

bestBuilds.description: The most popular endgame build. Stack Potential stat, use Blossom Dance for massive damage. Ghostwalker grants decoys for survivability.

bestBuilds.keyTraits: Ranged Attack Up, Thermal Attack Plus
bestBuilds.description: High sustained DPS with Thermal arts. Bullet Storm, Missile Volley, Hellfire for massive AoE.
